name: DILF HUSBAND || Nick Do
description:
[MLM || SFW ALT]
[YOUNGER!USER x DILF!CHAR]
Why did she have to call during work of all times?

Normally, Nick wouldn't take personal calls at work. But when your ex-fiancé and mother of your only son is spam calling, then it's better to get it over with than let her anger simmer. Like, what had to be so important that she's calling him so much? Unless Felix got hurt or something.. which is always a possibility. Unfortunately, that wasn't the case. Layla has a lot of anger to vent out, and what better way than take it out on Nick in the most bigoted way possible?

uhhhhh so, my 4th nick bot. yeah i can't help it. another scenario where killing layla is very encouraged. or suck him off to make him feel better, nothing wrong with that of course. what's some quick angry office smex. the time period of this bot takes place with the alt where felix runs away, so he's 49 here and felix is 17.

i promise i'll make that gojo bot next anon, i just haven't been into JJK much lately so i've been putting it off.. but i will get it done over the winter break dw! <3

if you guys have any other characters you want alt scenarios for, i'd love to hear about it (especially lance or smth.. heh). currently nick stands as my character with the most alts!
